rationale: Educ. Code §21.0451 governs sanctions for educator preparation programs. It has no reference to property tax exemptions, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises from the proposed change.
quote: The board shall propose rules necessary for the sanction of educator preparation programs that do not meet accountability standards or comply with state law or rules
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator preparation accountability statute.
